sets.name: Ember Gems
sets.lore: Forged in magma pockets miles below the surface, these gems carry a warmth that never fades — even in the coldest inventory chest.

items.name: Cinder Shard
items.description: A rough fragment of cooled magma. The edges are sharp enough to cut leather.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'Still warm. How is it still warm?'

items.name: Ash Ruby
items.description: A ruby dulled by centuries of ash coating. Clean it and it catches light like a small sun.
items.flavorText: Mira: 'I've got twelve of these. I'll give you two for that fossil you found.'

items.name: Flare Topaz
items.description: An orange-gold topaz that flickers as if lit from within. No heat source has ever been identified.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'Don't stare at it too long. Makes your eyes water.'

items.name: Magma Opal
items.description: A swirling opal threaded with veins of liquid fire. The veins move slowly if you watch long enough.
items.flavorText: Calla: 'I've only ever seen three of those. Where did you find it?'

items.name: Heart of the Seam
items.description: A perfect sphere of compressed volcanic glass. It pulses with a slow, deep rhythm — like a heartbeat.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'I think the mountain is still alive.'

sets.name: Stone Fossils
sets.lore: Remnants of creatures that lived before the first digger ever raised a pick. Each one tells a story in calcium and silence.

items.name: Mudskipper Fin
items.description: A flattened impression of a prehistoric fish fin. The bone structure is surprisingly elegant.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'There was an ocean here. An actual ocean.'

items.name: Root Cast
items.description: A hollow stone cast left by a root system that rotted away millennia ago. The branching pattern is complex.
items.flavorText: Mira: 'Common as dirt. Literally.'

items.name: Trilobite Claw
items.description: A single articulated claw from an ancient crustacean. Perfectly preserved in iron-rich sediment.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'My kid would love that. Don't tell her I said that.'

items.name: Fernleaf Print
items.description: A stone slab bearing the perfect negative impression of a large fern. Every vein is visible.
items.flavorText: Calla: 'We had one of those in the Guild Hall. Sold it to pay the roof repairs.'

items.name: Wyrm Spine
items.description: A single vertebra from something very large. The size suggests the creature was longer than the Guild Hall is wide.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'What was this thing?'

sets.name: Deep Water Relics
sets.lore: The Iron Seam was once an ocean floor. These relics remember.

items.name: Tide Anchor
items.description: A miniature iron anchor, corroded but intact. Was this a model, or did something very small sail here?
items.flavorText: Dex: 'Weird little thing. Keep it.'

items.name: Shell Compass
items.description: A compass rose carved into a large spiral shell. The needle still points somewhere — it just isn't north.
items.flavorText: Mira: 'What does it point to? Has anyone followed it? Someone should follow it.'

items.name: Salt Idol
items.description: A humanoid figure carved entirely from compressed sea salt. It hasn't dissolved. It should have dissolved.
items.flavorText: Calla: 'Don't lick it. I'm serious, don't lick it.'

items.name: Drowned Bell
items.description: A brass bell encrusted with barnacles that calcified long ago. When struck it rings, and then — after a long pause — something rings back.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'I'm not striking it again.'

sets.name: The Void Trinity
sets.lore: Three objects from beyond the known strata. The Guild records mention them only once, in a burned chapter.

items.name: Null Gem
items.description: A gem that absorbs all light that touches it. It has no reflections, no refractions. Looking at it too long makes the edges of your vision blur.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'It doesn't feel like I'm holding anything. But I am. I think.'

items.name: Echo Relic
items.description: A flat disc etched with concentric circles. When you speak near it, the sound comes back — but the words are different.
items.flavorText: Ren said: 'Hello.' It said: 'Finally.'

items.name: The Still Artifact
items.description: An object of indeterminate shape. Every time you look at it, it appears to be a different object — but you cannot remember what it looked like before.
items.flavorText: Calla's journal, entry 47: 'Do not let the apprentice find all three.'

sets.name: Crystal Chorus
sets.lore: When these gems are placed together, Mira claims they hum a low chord. Nobody else can hear it. Mira insists this makes her special.

reward.passive: Seismic Tap skill unlocked · +5% all drop rates

items.name: Pale Resonite
items.description: A translucent crystal of pale blue-green hue. Tap it and it rings for exactly three seconds — no more, no less.
items.flavorText: Mira: 'Don't tap it. Actually — tap it. Did you hear that? Tell me you heard that.'

items.name: Singing Quartz
items.description: A quartz crystal that emits a faint continuous tone when held. The frequency is different for every person who holds it.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'It sounds like the elevator in the Guild Hall. Which is weird, because I find that comforting.'

items.name: Echo Crystal
items.description: A deep blue hexagonal crystal that stores sound. Hold it to your ear and you hear conversations from whatever room it was last in.
items.flavorText: Ren held one to their ear for a long time. They didn't say what they heard.

items.name: Resonance Core
items.description: The central crystal of a node cluster. When removed, the surrounding Grotto goes silent for hours.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'The whole tunnel stopped humming when you took that. Put it back.' Ren did not put it back.

items.name: The Grand Tone
items.description: A perfectly formed crystal octahedron the size of a fist. When placed near the other Chorus gems, all four begin to vibrate in a four-note chord. Even people who can't hear the others can hear this.
items.flavorText: Mira cried. She said it was because of allergies. There are no plants underground.

sets.name: Iron Seam Minerals
sets.lore: Dex keeps a replica of each of these on his workshop shelf. He says they remind him why he started digging.

items.name: Rough Iron Nub
items.description: A knobby lump of unprocessed iron ore. Unremarkable individually but the foundation of everything built above.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'That's what pays our wages. Ugly as sin and worth its weight in everything.'

items.name: Magnetite Chip
items.description: A small chip of magnetite that sticks to other iron items in your pack. Mildly inconvenient. Technically valuable.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'It keeps sticking to my pick. Is that normal?' Dex: 'Yes.' Ren: 'Is it a problem?' Dex: 'No.'

items.name: Silvered Ore
items.description: Iron ore with silver threading through it like veins. The silver content is too low to refine, but the pattern is beautiful.
items.flavorText: Mira: 'Sell it to me. I'll give you fair price.' Ren: 'What's fair price?' Mira: 'Whatever I say it is.'

items.name: Steel Vein Slab
items.description: A flat slab of rock shot through with natural steel. The steel formed without smelting, under pressure and centuries of heat.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'That's not supposed to exist. Natural steel doesn't happen. Keep it quiet.'

items.name: True Iron Heart
items.description: A perfectly spherical nodule of pure iron that formed over thousands of years, layer by layer, like a pearl. The Guild's founders wrote about it. They never found it.
items.flavorText: Dex didn't say anything for a long time. Then: 'My father spent twenty years looking for that.'

sets.name: Ashen Artifacts
sets.lore: Someone carried these out of the Magma Shelf long ago. The scorch marks on them are older than the Guild itself.

reward.passive: Fire immunity passive — Magma Pocket cooldown –50%

items.name: Char Totem
items.description: A carved wooden totem that somehow survived the heat. The carving depicts a figure holding a flame — or being consumed by one.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'Wood. This is wood. How is there wood down here?'

items.name: Cinder Mask
items.description: A ceramic mask blackened by extreme heat. The expression is serene. Whoever made it was not afraid of what they were making it for.
items.flavorText: Calla, quietly: 'We found one of these near where your parent was working. Don't ask me what it means yet.'

items.name: Flamecaster Shard
items.description: A triangular shard from a larger device. One edge is designed to focus heat. Whatever it was part of, it was built to direct fire precisely.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'That's not a tool for digging. That's a tool for something else entirely.'

items.name: The Pyre Key
items.description: A key made of material that should have melted at these temperatures. It fits no lock anyone has found — yet. The bow is shaped like a flame frozen mid-flicker.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'This was theirs. I know it was. I don't know how I know.'

sets.name: Root Relics
sets.lore: The oldest things in the collection. Calla once offered to buy all five from a digger who had them. He refused. Calla never speaks about it.

items.name: Clay Seal
items.description: A hardened clay disc stamped with a symbol no living person recognizes. The clay is older than the oldest known settlement in the region.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'Someone made this. Someone was here before us.'

items.name: Stone Effigy
items.description: A small figure carved from sandstone. The features are worn smooth but the posture — arms raised, head back — suggests celebration or supplication.
items.flavorText: Mira: 'Or it's screaming. Could be screaming.'

items.name: Grove Totem
items.description: A totem carved from petrified wood, hung with stones on leather cords that are somehow still intact. It smells faintly of pine.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'I grew up near a forest. Haven't smelled pine in fifteen years.' He was quiet after that.

items.name: Bone Marker
items.description: A sharpened bone stake driven into the rock. Whatever it was marking, whoever put it there knew exactly where they were.
items.flavorText: Calla: 'We pulled one of those out of Layer 9 when I was your age. The foreman before me said to put it back. We didn't.'

items.name: The First Root
items.description: A length of petrified root as thick as a forearm, perfectly preserved. It descends — there is no base. It goes deeper than the rock it's embedded in should allow.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'It goes further down. The root just keeps going.' Calla: 'Yes. It does.'

sets.name: Void Minerals
sets.lore: They absorb light. They should not exist at the depths they were found. The Guild has no explanation.

reward.passive: Loot Sense skill — passive item glow on all cells

items.name: Null Dust
items.description: A compressed chip of fine black particulate. It doesn't catch light. It doesn't reflect torchlight. It simply exists in its own small absence.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'My headlamp gets dimmer when I hold this. Am I imagining that?' Dex: 'You're not imagining that.'

items.name: Dark Ore Chip
items.description: A flake of ore that is denser than it should be for its size. Physics, apparently, is a suggestion this deep.
items.flavorText: Mira, through the radio: 'The instruments are going weird up here. What are you holding?'

items.name: Hollow Stone
items.description: A stone that is hollow but doesn't rattle. Nothing moves inside it. Nothing should be able to fit inside it given its weight.
items.flavorText: Ren shook it for a long time. 'Still nothing,' they said. 'That's the part that bothers me,' said Dex.

items.name: Void Vein Sliver
items.description: A thin needle of void ore pulled from a vein that runs horizontal through the bedrock for an unknown distance. The vein did not exist on any survey map.
items.flavorText: Calla's map, revised: 'Do not follow the vein. Do NOT follow the vein.'

sets.name: Tidal Fossils
sets.lore: From the same ancient ocean as the Deep Water Relics — but older. Much older.

items.name: Ammonite Coil
items.description: A spiraling ammonite fossil the size of a hand. The chambers are still intact. The creature that made them is not.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'I'm going to name this one Gerald.' Mira: 'You can't name fossils.' Ren named it Gerald.

items.name: Brine Claw
items.description: The fossilized claw of a large crustacean, curved and serrated. The size implies a creature that had no natural predators.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'Good. Because whatever it hunted is probably also down here somewhere.'

items.name: Coral Horn
items.description: A branching coral structure fossilized in iron-grey stone. Every branch terminates in a perfect point.
items.flavorText: Mira put it in a glass case immediately. 'Don't breathe on it,' she said.

items.name: Petrified Eel
items.description: A full-length eel fossil coiled in a striking position. Its mouth is open. Its teeth are visible. It looks angry. It looked angry for millions of years.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'This one's name is Beatrice.'

items.name: Deep God Skull
items.description: A skull the size of a cartwheel from an entirely unknown species. The eye sockets face forward. It was a predator. It had four of them.
items.flavorText: Nobody named this one. Even Ren went quiet.

sets.name: Cold Seam Gems
sets.lore: Found only in pockets where the groundwater has frozen and refrozen for centuries. Mira calls them 'the prettiest useless things in existence.'

items.name: Ice Speck
items.description: A tiny frozen gem no larger than a thumbnail. Should have melted. Hasn't. Gives the impression it won't.
items.flavorText: Ren: 'It's cold. Everything down here is hot and this is cold.' Dex: 'Yes. That's the point.'

items.name: Glacial Chip
items.description: A shard of permanently frozen mineral water. Geologically impossible. Practically beautiful.
items.flavorText: Mira keeps hers in a lead-lined box. 'For preservation,' she says. The box sweats on warm days.

items.name: Frozen Sapphire
items.description: A sapphire formed in a pocket of ancient permafrost. The internal fracture lines are frozen in place — any warmth would shatter it. It has seen neither in a thousand years.
items.flavorText: Calla: 'Handle it with gloves. And don't bring it near the forge. And don't let Dex breathe on it.'

sets.name: Resonance Artifacts
sets.lore: These artifacts are the reason the Grottos hum. Ren touched one on Layer 38 and saw something. They haven't talked about it.

reward.passive: Reveal all Crystal Node locations on layer entry

items.name: Tone Fork Shard
items.description: Half of a crystal tuning fork. The half that remains vibrates at a frequency that matches nothing in known music theory.
items.flavorText: Mira tried to match its pitch for an entire afternoon. She gave up. She never gives up.

items.name: Resonance Plate
items.description: A flat plate of crystal etched with patterns that correspond to sound wave diagrams. Someone mapped acoustic frequencies underground before instruments existed to measure them.
items.flavorText: Dex: 'This is a blueprint. Someone built something with these specs. What did they build?'

items.name: The Grand Resonator
items.description: A complete crystal device, intact and operational. When activated it emits a pulse that passes through solid rock without losing strength. Its purpose remains unknown. Its range is not.
items.flavorText: Ren touched it on Layer 38. They saw a figure in the light below. The figure turned around.
